message:
feat(tui): add 4 new view modes, mouse support, search modes, priority hints, and action shortcuts

This is a major TUI expansion adding four new interactive view modes,
mouse wheel scrolling, field-specific history search, inline priority
analysis, and several quality-of-life action shortcuts.

New view modes (each toggled by a hotkey, with list/detail split):

1. Actionable (key: a) — shows the execution plan computed by the
   analyzer's `plan()` function. The list panel displays tracks with
   item counts and reasons; the detail panel shows individual items with
   scores, unblocks lists, and claim commands. j/k navigates tracks in
   list focus, items in detail focus.

2. Attention (key: !) — ranks labels by attention score using
   `compute_label_attention()`. The list panel shows a tabular view with
   rank, label, score, and reason. The detail panel expands all scoring
   factors: open/blocked/stale counts, PageRank sum, staleness factor,
   block impact, velocity factor, and lists all affected open issues.

3. Tree (key: T) — interactive dependency tree with DFS-based
   flattening, box-drawing prefixes, and collapse/expand via Enter.
   Nodes show status icons (o/x/-), collapse indicators ([+]/[-]), and
   cycle-safe traversal via a visited set. The detail panel shows the
   selected issue's blockers and dependents with titles.

4. Label Dashboard (key: [) — comprehensive label health view using
   `compute_all_label_health()`. The list panel shows health bars
   (10-char ASCII), health scores, open/closed counts, and
   critical/warning markers. The detail panel breaks down velocity
   (7d/30d closures, avg days to close, trend), freshness (avg days
   since update, stale count), flow (dep counts, cross-label blocking),
   and criticality (PageRank, betweenness, bottlenecks).

Mouse support:
- Mouse scroll up/down events are translated to Up/Down key presses,
  enabling touchpad and scroll wheel navigation in all views.
- New `Msg::Mouse(MouseEventKind)` variant and `handle_mouse()` method.

History search modes (Tab cycles while search is active):
- All (default) — searches across SHA, message, author, files.
- Commit (msg) — commit message text only.
- Sha — SHA prefix matching (uses `starts_with` instead of `contains`).
- Bead — searches by correlated bead ID/title.
- Author — author name and email.
- The search mode is shown in the footer and detail panel, and Tab/BackTab
  cycle through modes in both bead-history and git-history views.

Action shortcuts:
- p — toggles priority hints in the main detail panel, showing inline
  triage score, confidence, reasons, and a full 8-component score
  breakdown with mini ASCII bar charts.
- C — copies the selected issue ID to the system clipboard.
- x — exports the selected issue as a markdown file to $TMPDIR.
- O — opens the selected issue as YAML in $EDITOR.
- Ctrl+R / F5 — refreshes all data from disk, preserving the current
  selection by ID when possible, and recomputing derived views.

Help overlay rewrite:
- Replaced the flat text list with a structured multi-column layout that
  adapts to terminal width (1/2/3 columns). Nine categorized sections
  (Navigation, Views, Filters, Search, Actions, History, Board, Insights,
  Global) are rendered side-by-side with aligned key/description pairs.
- The footer shows scroll position (line N/M) and available controls.

Footer improvements:
- Main mode footer now shows action hints (p/C/x/O) instead of the
  verbose legacy description.
- One-shot status messages (clipboard, export, editor) display in the
  footer and auto-clear on next keypress.

Other changes:
- All test app constructors updated with the new fields
  (history_search_mode, actionable_plan, attention_result, tree state,
  label_dashboard, priority_hints_visible, status_msg).
- Updated 9 snapshot files to reflect the new footer text and help
  overlay layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,4 +31,4 @@ bvr | mode=Main | focus=list | issues=2/3 | filter=open | sort=default | ? help
 │                                        ││                                                        │
 │                                        ││                                                        │
 └────────────────────────────────────────┘└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
-Main view mirrors bv split workflow. Press b/i/g/h for focused modes | s cycles sort (default)
+b/i/g/h modes | s sort (default) | p hints | C copy | x export | O edit

@@ -1,34 +1,35 @@
 ---
 source: src/tui.rs
+assertion_line: 10439
 expression: text
 ---
 bvr | mode=Main | focus=list | issues=3/3 | filter=all | sort=default | ? help | Tab focus | Esc bac
 ┌Help──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │                                                                                                  │
-│ Core keys:                                                                                       │
-│   j/k or arrows  Move selection                                                                  │
-│   h/l             Mode-aware lateral nav (board lanes, graph peers, insights pane focus)         │
-│   Ctrl+d/Ctrl+u   Jump down/up by 10 rows                                                        │
-│   PgUp/PgDn       Jump by 10 rows                                                                │
-│   Home/End         Jump to top/bottom                                                            │
-│   /               Board/History/Graph/Insights: search (n/N match cycling)                       │
-│   Tab              Toggle list/detail focus                                                      │
-│   J/K              Detail: navigate blockers/dependents (board/graph/insights)                   │
-│   b/i/g/h          Toggle board/insights/graph/history                                           │
-│   Enter            Return to main detail pane                                                    │
-│   o/c/r/a          Filter open/closed/ready/all                                                  │
-│   s                Main: cycle sort | Board: cycle grouping | Insights: cycle panel              │
-│   ?                Toggle help overlay                                                           │
-│   Esc              Back from mode (or clear filter, then quit confirm in main)                   │
-│   q                Main: quit | Non-main: return to main                                         │
-│   Ctrl+C           Quit immediately                                                              │
-│                                                                                                  │
-│                                                                                                  │
-│                                                                                                  │
-│                                                                                                  │
-│                                                                                                  │
-│                                                                                                  │
-│                                                                                                  │
+│ [Navigation]                                     | [Search]                                      │
+│   j/k          Move selection up/down            |   /            Start search                   │
+│   arrows       Move selection up/down            |   n/N          Next/prev search match         │
+│   h/l          Lateral nav (lanes, peers)        |   Tab          Cycle search mode (in /)       │
+│   Ctrl+d/u     Jump down/up by 10                |   Esc          Cancel search                  │
+│   PgUp/PgDn    Jump by 10                        |   Enter        Confirm search                 │
+│   Home/End     Jump to top/bottom                |                                               │
+│   G            Jump to bottom                    | [Actions]                                     │
+│   Tab          Toggle list/detail focus          |   p            Toggle priority hints          │
+│   J/K          Navigate deps in detail           |   C            Copy issue ID                  │
+│   Enter        Return to main / drill            |   x            Export issue markdown          │
+│   scroll       Mouse wheel scrolls list          |   O            Open in editor                 │
+│                                                  |   Ctrl+R/F5    Refresh from disk              │
+│ [Views]                                          |                                               │
+│   b            Toggle board mode                 | [History]                                     │
+│   i            Toggle insights mode              |   c            Cycle confidence filter        │
+│   g            Toggle graph mode                 |   y            Copy SHA/ID                    │
+│   h            Toggle history mode               |   o            Open commit in browser         │
+│   !            Toggle attention mode             |   f            Toggle file tree               │
+│   v            History: bead/git toggle          |                                               │
+│                                                  | [Board]                                       │
+│ [Filters]                                        |   1-4          Jump to lane                   │
+│   o            Filter: open only                 |   H/L          First/last lane                │
+│   c            Filter: closed only               |   0/$          First/last in lane             │
 │                                                                                                  │
 └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
-? or Esc to close help
+? or Esc close | j/k scroll | Ctrl+d/u page | line 1/37
